loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing I-THD (current harmonic distortion) — voltage THD, specific harmonics (H5/H7), flicker, crest factor, and compliance/narrative fields are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current and voltage THD trends — specific harmonic orders (5th/7th) are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing True PF as a proxy for K-factor — this meter does not measure K-factor directly.
